prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a residential job — a service call, remodel, or homeowner installation with prescriptive code and manufacturer instructions. The work under review is Block/brick laying, part of the Concrete & Masonry scope. The observed field condition is: ladder reinforcement spacing exceeded. The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: TMS 402/602.
title: Compliance check: Block/brick laying (residential job)
